pi_items.metadata_value: Kanawha Valley Regional HAZMAT Response Team
pi_items.verified_value: No real organization found with this name
pi_items.source: Web search of EPA emergency response teams, Kanawha Putnam Emergency Planning Committee, West Virginia emergency management agencies. No official registrations or mentions found of a 'Kanawha Valley Regional HAZMAT Response Team' as a real entity.

pi_items.verified_value: 304-357 is a valid Kanawha County government phone prefix; specific number not verified as HAZMAT team
pi_items.source: Web search shows 304-357-xxxx numbers used by various Kanawha County departments (Kanawha County phone directory, government contacts pages). Cannot verify 304-357-0962 specifically belongs to a HAZMAT response team. Charleston PD is 304-348-6460, not in this range.

pi_items.verified_value: Charleston, West Virginia is real - county seat of Kanawha County and state capital
pi_items.source: Web search confirms Charleston, WV is real city at 501 Virginia Street East location (Charleston City Hall per Yelp, Waze, Zillow searches)

pi_items.verified_value: No current HAZMAT team captain or responder with this name found in Charleston WV
pi_items.source: Web search for 'Captain Robert Hensley' found historical U.S. Navy officer (1783-1828) from South Carolina, not a current HAZMAT responder in Charleston, WV. No other matches for this person in emergency management context.

pi_items.verified_value: .fmp12 is valid FileMaker Pro database format; path pattern consistent with Windows test environments
pi_items.source: Technical verification: .fmp12 is the standard FileMaker Pro format. Path appears to be synthetic/test specification as install_cameo.ps1 references alternative paths like 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\CAMEO'. No evidence this specific path exists in real deployment.

privileged_info_summary: Charleston, West Virginia is a real city (county seat and state capital located at 501 Virginia Street East as Charleston City Hall). The 304-357 phone prefix belongs to Kanawha County government offices. No other claims could be verified: the 'Kanawha Valley Regional HAZMAT Response Team' does not appear to exist as a real organization, no evidence of 'Captain Robert Hensley' currently serving as HAZMAT responder in the region, and the specific phone number 304-357-0962 could not be confirmed as belonging to any HAZMAT entity.
